rationale: Educ. Code §39.0823 governs deficit projection and interim financial reporting for school districts. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount, so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: If the commissioner, based on the indicators adopted under Section 39.082 or other relevant information, projects a deficit for a school district or open-enrollment charter school general fund within the following three school years, the agency shall provide the district or school interim financial reports
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school district revenues is possible but does not trigger a statutory conflict under this provision.
